title: v4.8.0 — Cloud Saves & Friends
message:
FluxBucks now supports Google sign-in! Your save data syncs to the cloud automatically so you never lose progress.

• Sign in with Google from Settings → Account
• Cloud saves sync chips, stats, achievements, and all settings
• Add friends using friend codes and view their profiles
• Your save merges intelligently — the one with more progress wins

Head to Settings and tap 'Sign In' to get started.
